Name: Average time from SW-Checklist Completed to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Total time between SW-Checklist Completed and SW-Awaiting AE Assignment across all cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to occur after SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Average duration of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment when followed by SW-Initial Reviewer Selection versus when followed by SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Total elapsed time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in variants that include Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Average time until SW-Awaiting AE Assignment is performed in cases where the variant includes SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Total time spent in SW-Awaiting AE Assignment compared to the time spent in SW-Awaiting EIC Decision within the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Average cycle time of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment when the subsequent activity is SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and SW-AE Assign Reviewers in variants that eventually lead to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to be completed after Plagiarism Originality Report Completed in rejected versus accepted manuscript trajectories
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in variants that contain reviewer invitation reminders versus those that do not
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 occurs

Name: Minimum waiting time to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment following SW-Checklist Completed in cases with no checklist delay notifications
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Time from SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in multi-round review variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Average time between SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and the first occurrence of SW-AE Assign Reviewers across all process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Minimum time from Manuscript Export Succeeded to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in high-performance variants (performance < 500,000)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'", 'aggregation': 'minimum', 'filter': 'code < 500000'}"
